introSection: Fire Runner is a steel single rail roller coaster located at Lost Island Theme Park in Waterloo, Iowa, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On May 16, 2025, Lost Island shared a video of the final track piece being installed.

On July 14, Lost Island announced that the ride's grand opening would be on July 18.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Fire Runner is a mirrored version of the Raptor Track Prototype layout manufactured by Rocky Mountain Construction.

fullText:
Fire Runner is a steel single rail roller coaster located at Lost Island Theme Park in Waterloo, Iowa, USA.

On May 16, 2025, Lost Island shared a video of the final track piece being installed.

On July 14, Lost Island announced that the ride's grand opening would be on July 18.

Fire Runner is a mirrored version of the Raptor Track Prototype layout manufactured by Rocky Mountain Construction.
